JSON in request body\");\n      }\n      if (!data.roomId) {\n        return res.badRequest(\"roomId parameter is required\");\n      }\n      const autoCreate = data.autoCreate !== void 0 ? data.autoCreate : true;\n      const result = await this.findOptimalShard(data.roomId, autoCreate);\n      if (\"error\" in result) {\n        return res.notFound(result.error);\n      }\n      return res.success({\n        success: true,\n        shardId: result.shardId,\n        url: result.url\n      });\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Error connecting to shard:\", error);\n      return res.serverError();\n    }\n  }\n  async findOptimalShard(roomId, autoCreate = true) {\n    let room = this.rooms()[roomId];\n    if (!room) {\n      if (autoCreate) {\n        const mockRequest = {\n          json: /* @__PURE__ */ __name(async () => ({\n            name: roomId,\n            balancingStrategy: \"round-robin\",\n            public: true,\n            maxPlayersPerShard: this.defaultMaxConnectionsPerShard(),\n            minShards: 1,\n            maxShards: void 0\n          }), \"json\")\n        };\n        await this.registerRoom(mockRequest);\n        room = this.rooms()[roomId];\n        if (!room) {\n          return {\n            error: `Failed to create room ${roomId}`\n          };\n        }\n      } else {\n        return {\n          error: `Room ${roomId} does not exist`\n        };\n      }\n    }\n    const roomShards = Object.values(this.shards()).filter((shard) => shard.roomId() === roomId);\n    if (roomShards.length === 0) {\n      if (autoCreate) {\n        const newShard = await this.createShard(roomId);\n        if (newShard) {\n          return {\n            shardId: newShard.id,\n            url: newShard.url()\n          };\n        } else {\n          return {\n            error: `Failed to create shard for room ${roomId}`\n          };\n        }\n      } else {\n        return {\n          error: `No shards available for room ${roomId}`\n        };\n      }\n    }\n    const activeShards = roomShards.filter((shard) => shard && shard.status() === \"active\");\n    if (activeShards.length === 0) {\n      return {\n        error: `No active shards available for room ${roomId}`\n      };\n    }\n    const balancingStrategy = room.balancingStrategy();\n    let selectedShard;\n    switch (balancingStrategy) {\n      case \"least-connections\":\n        selectedShard = activeShards.reduce((min, shard) => shard.currentConnections() < min.currentConnections() ? shard : min, activeShards[0]);\n        break;\n      case \"random\":\n        selectedShard = activeShards[Math.floor(Math.random() * activeShards.length)];\n        break;\n      case \"round-robin\":\n      default:\n        const counter = this.rrCounters()[roomId] || 0;\n        const nextCounter = (counter + 1) % activeShards.length;\n        this.rrCounters()[roomId] = nextCounter;\n        selectedShard = activeShards[counter];\n        break;\n    }\n    return {\n      shardId: selectedShard.id,\n      url: selectedShard.url()\n    };\n  }\n  // Private methods\n  async createShard(roomId, urlTemplate, maxConnections) {\n    const room = this.rooms()[roomId];\n    if (!room) {\n      console.error(`Cannot create shard for non-existent room: ${roomId}`);\n      return null;\n    }\n    const shardId = `${roomId}:${Date.now()}-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 1e4)}`;\n    const template = urlTemplate || this.defaultShardUrlTemplate();\n    const url = template.replace(\"{shardId}\", shardId).replace(\"{roomId}\", roomId);\n    const max = maxConnections || room.maxPlayersPerShard();\n    const newShard = new ShardInfo();\n    newShard.id = shardId;\n    newShard.roomId.set(roomId);\n    newShard.url.set(url);\n    newShard.maxConnections.set(max);\n    newShard.currentConnections.set(0);\n    newShard.status.set(\"active\");\n    newShard.lastHeartbeat.set(Date.now());\n    this.shards()[shardId] = newShard;\n    return newShard;\n  }\n};\n_ts_decorate([\n  sync(RoomConfig)\n], WorldRoom.prototype, \"rooms\", void 0);\n_ts_decorate([\n  sync(ShardInfo)\n], WorldRoom.prototype, \"shards\", void 0);\n_ts_decorate([\n  persist()\n], WorldRoom.prototype, \"rrCounters\", void 0);\n_ts_decorate([\n  Request2({\n    path: \"register-room\",\n    method: \"POST\"\n  }),\n  Guard([\n    guardManageWorld\n  ]),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:type\", Function),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:paramtypes\", [\n    typeof party_exports === \"undefined\" || typeof void 0 === \"undefined\" ? Object : void 0\n  ]),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:returntype\", Promise)\n], WorldRoom.prototype, \"registerRoom\", null);\n_ts_decorate([\n  Request2({\n    path: \"update-shard\",\n    method: \"POST\"\n  }),\n  Guard([\n    guardManageWorld\n  ]),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:type\", Function),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:paramtypes\", [\n    typeof party_exports === \"undefined\" || typeof void 0 === \"undefined\" ? Object : void 0,\n    typeof ServerResponse === \"undefined\" ? Object : ServerResponse\n  ]),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:returntype\", Promise)\n], WorldRoom.prototype, \"updateShardStats\", null);\n_ts_decorate([\n  Request2({\n    path: \"scale-room\",\n    method: \"POST\"\n  }),\n  Guard([\n    guardManageWorld\n  ]),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:type\", Function),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:paramtypes\", [\n    typeof party_exports === \"undefined\" || typeof void 0 === \"undefined\" ? Object : void 0,\n    typeof ServerResponse === \"undefined\" ? Object : ServerResponse\n  ]),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:returntype\", Promise)\n], WorldRoom.prototype, \"scaleRoom\", null);\n_ts_decorate([\n  Request2({\n    path: \"connect\",\n    method: \"POST\"\n  }),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:type\", Function),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:paramtypes\", [\n    typeof party_exports === \"undefined\" || typeof void 0 === \"undefined\" ? Object : void 0,\n    typeof ServerResponse === \"undefined\" ? Object : ServerResponse\n  ]),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:returntype\", Promise)\n], WorldRoom.prototype, \"connect\", null);\nWorldRoom = _ts_decorate([\n  Room({\n    path: \"world-{worldId}\",\n    maxUsers: 100,\n    throttleStorage: 2e3,\n    throttleSync: 500\n  }),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:type\", Function),\n  _ts_metadata(\"design:paramtypes\", [\n    typeof party_exports === \"undefined\" || typeof void 0 === \"undefined\" ? Object : void 0\n  ])\n], WorldRoom);\n\n// src/session.guard.ts\nfunction createRequireSessionGuard(storage) {\n  return async (sender, value) => {\n    if (!sender || !sender.id) {\n      return false;\n    }\n    try {\n      const session = await storage.get(`session:${sender.id}`);\n      if (!session) {\n        return false;\n      }\n      const typedSession = session;\n      if (!typedSession.publicId) {\n        return false;\n      }\n      return true;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Error checking session in requireSession guard:\", error);\n      return false;\n    }\n  };\n}\n__name(createRequireSessionGuard, \"createRequireSessionGuard\");\nvar requireSession = /* @__PURE__ */ __name(async (sender, value, room) => {\n  if (!sender || !sender.id) {\n    return false;\n  }\n  try {\n    const session = await room.storage.get(`session:${sender.id}`);\n    if (!session) {\n      return false;\n    }\n    const typedSession = session;\n    if (!typedSession.publicId) {\n      return false;\n    }\n    return true;\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error checking session in requireSession guard:\", error);\n    return false;\n  }\n}, \"requireSession\");\nexport {\n  Action,\n  ClientIo,\n  Guard,\n  MockConnection,\n  Request2 as Request,\n  Room,\n  RoomGuard,\n  Server,\n  ServerIo,\n  ServerResponse,\n  Shard,\n  UnhandledAction,\n  WorldRoom,\n  createRequireSessionGuard,\n  request,\n  requireSession,\n  testRoom,\n  tick\n};\n//# KAAK,UAAU,QAAQ;AAC/B,QAAI,IAAI,WAAW,WAAW,CAC5B;AAEF,QAAI,OAAO,IACT;AAEF,SAAM,WAAW,KAAK,MAAM;;AAE9B,QAAK,UAAU,WAAW,KAAK;KAC9B,aAAa;AAChB,WAAS,aAAa,EAAE;AACxB,WAAS,YAAY,SAAS,gBAAgB;AAC9C,WAAS,+BAA+B,IAAI,KAAK;AACjD,WAAS,sCAAsC,IAAI,KAAK;AACxD,WAAS,SAAS,MAAM,QAAQ;AAC9B,UAAO,KAAK,KAAK,MAAM,KAAK,SAAS;;AAEvC,WAAS,cAAc,QAAQ;AAC7B,UAAO,KAAK,UAAU,KAAK,SAAS;;AAEtC,WAAS,mBAAmB;GAC1B,IAAI;AACJ,OAAI,SAAS,aAAa,OAAO,GAAG;AAClC,QAAI,QAAQ,aACV,aAAY,SAAS,cAAc,SAAS,WAAW;AAEzD,aAAS,YAAY,SAAS,cAAc,SAAS,WAAW;AAChE,aAAS,aAAa,OAAO;SAE7B,UAAS,SAAS;GAEpB,MAAM,qBAAqB,IAAI,IAAI,SAAS,oBAAoB,MAAM,CAAC;AACvE,QAAK,MAAM,CAAC,MAAM,aAAa,SAAS,oBACtC,MAAK,KAAK,MAAM;IACd,MAAM;IACN,OAAO;KACL,KAAK;KACL,GAAG;KACJ;IACF,EAAE,SAAS;AAEd,YAAS,oBAAoB,OAAO;AACpC,QAAK,MAAM,QAAQ,KAAK,KAAK,gBAAgB,CAC3C,KAAI,CAAC,mBAAmB,IAAI,KAAK,CAC/B,MAAK,KAAK,MAAM;IACd,MAAM;IACN,OAAO;IACR,EAAE,SAAS;;AAIlB,WAAS,mBAAmB,OAAO,MAAM,iBAAiB;GACxD,IAAI;GACJ,MAAM,UAAU,KAAK,iBAAiB,SAAS;AAC/C,OAAI,CAAC,SAAS;AACZ,YAAQ,MAAM,8DAA8D;AAC5E,WAAO;;GAET,MAAM,EAAE,aAAa,KAAK;AAC1B,UAAO,SAAS,CAAC;AACjB,OAAI,CAAC,MAAM;AACT,YAAQ,MAAM,wCAAwC,SAAS,aAAa;AAC5E,WAAO;;GAET,MAAM,WAAW,MAAM,KAAK,KAAK,QAAQ,MAAM;GAC/C,IAAI,cAAc;GAClB,IAAI,YAAY;AAChB,QAAK,MAAM,CAAC,KAAK,YAAY,SAC3B,KAAI,IAAI,WAAW,WAAW,IAAI,QAAQ,aAAa,UAAU;AAC/D,kBAAc;AACd,gBAAY,IAAI,QAAQ,YAAY,GAAG;AACvC;;AAGJ,OAAI,CAAC,eAAe,CAAC,WAAW;AAC9B,YAAQ,MAAM,0CAA0C,SAAS,aAAa;AAC9E,WAAO;;AAGT,OAAI,CADkB,KAAK,iBAAiB,SAAS,EACjC;AAClB,YAAQ,MAAM,8DAA8D;AAC5E,WAAO;;GAET,MAAM,eAAe,yBAAyB,KAAK;GACnD,MAAM,eAAe;IACnB;IACA;IACA,cAAc,YAAY;IAC1B;IACD;AACD,OAAI;IAEF,MAAM,YAAY,OADM,MAAM,KAAK,KAAK,QAAQ,QAAQ,KAAK,IAAI,aAAa,EACtC,MAAM,qBAAqB;KACjE,QAAQ;KACR,MAAM,KAAK,UAAU,aAAa;KAClC,SAAS,EACP,gBAAgB,oBACjB;KACF,CAAC;AACF,QAAI,CAAC,UAAU,GACb,OAAM,IAAI,MAAM,4BAA4B,MAAM,UAAU,MAAM,GAAG;IAEvE,MAAM,EAAE,kBAAkB,MAAM,UAAU,MAAM;AAChD,WAAO;YACA,OAAO;AACd,YAAQ,MAAM,wDAAwD,aAAa,IAAI,MAAM;AAC7F,WAAO;;;EAGX,MAAM,SAAyB,wBAAQ,WAAW;AAChD,OAAI,QAAQ,aACV,aAAY,QAAQ,SAAS,WAAW;AAE1C,OAAI,QAAQ,KAAK,aAAa;AAC5B,WAAO;AACP;;AAEF,OAAI,CAAC,SAAS,WAAW;AACvB
